_comment: Single interview preset. The demo runs this entry. References a Tavus persona and replica. `default_persona_id` is the reference Tavus persona to copy when no user-owned ID is configured — `npm run init` copies it into the user's Tavus account.

presets.title: Starfall Lead
presets.description: A loose, playful casting audition for the lead in Starfall, a new sci-fi series — a few quick beats and a little improv with Julian, our AI casting director.
